allSaves.value: +1 status to all saves vs. poison

details.publicNotes:
Conversion notes (this module)

Role: a Chelish con-artist perfumer hawking 'Lavender's Luxuriant Liniment' — a fake plague cure that is sugar, cheap scent, and river water (@Check[type:crafting|dc:22] to analyze). The mission is to expose her, not necessarily to fight; bring proof to the Guard.

Tactics: plays the harmless, shrieking merchant while angling for a poisoned Sneak Attack; charms foes at range; flees to her apartment (C2). Morale: surrenders at ≤10-ish HP and will say anything to escape the city alive. She burns her wand of remove disease keeping herself plague-free.

description.value: This mobile collection of vials and chemicals can be used for simple alchemical tasks.

Activate A Interact

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.mi4Md1fB2XThCand]{Effect: Antidote (Moderate)}

Activate A Interact

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +3 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.HeRHBo2NaKy5IxhU]{Effect: Antiplague (Moderate)}
This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Vendra carries the following infused items: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.SgtqZxt26BdjUmEB]{Acid Flask (Moderate)}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.gWr4q4HiyGhETA8H]{Alchemist's Fire (Moderate)}, 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.T4ouD4mVFHA3EHs6]{Bomber's Eye Elixir (Lesser)}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.nVvH1ZcM7OwIVIs8]{Frost Vial (Moderate)}, and 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.TZUskLT7yvP7N2co]{Elixir of Life (Lesser)}. These items last for 24 hours, or until the next time Vendra makes her daily preparations.

Vendra can use Performance instead of Diplomacy to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression} and instead of Intimidation to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize}. She can also use an acting Performance instead of Deception to Impersonate.

items.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Poison

description.value:
Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 2d6 persistent acid damage, and 2 acid splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.
@Localize[PF2E.BombNotes.AcidFlask.Moderate.success]

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 2d8 fire damage, 2 persistent fire damage, and 2 fire splash damage. You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate A Interact

This tincture lets you pinpoint your foes. For the next 5 minutes, your alchemical bomb Strikes reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your targets gain from cover by 1.

The liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals the listed cold damage and cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. Many types of frost vial also grant an item bonus to attack rolls.

You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls, the bomb deals 2d6 cold damage and 2 cold splash damage, and the target takes a -10-foot penalty.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.dv0IKm5syOdP759w]{Effect: Frost Vial (Moderate)}

Activate A Interact

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creatures natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain [[/r {3d6+6}[healing]]]{3d6+6 Hit Points} and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.EpB7yJPEuG6ez4z3]{Effect: Elixir of Life (Lesser)}
@Localize[PF2E.BombNotes.AlchemistsFire.Moderate.success]
@Localize[PF2E.BombNotes.FrostVial.Moderate.success]
Vendra Interacts to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

Requirements Vendra is holding a bomb or elixir

Effect Vendra combines the bomb with another bomb or the elixir with another elixir. She can Interact to draw a second bomb or elixir if necessary as part of this action. She attempts a @Check[type:crafting|dc:28] check, destroying both component items to create one new item. If a viable resulting item isn't used by the end of Vendra's next turn, it explodes as described under critical failure.

Critical Success The new item has the full effect of both component items when used.

Success The new item combines both items, but halves the effect of each. (This halves damage for bombs, the amount of healing of elixirs of life, or the duration for effects that can't have their value halved. Details are determined by the GM.)

Failure The new item is inert.

Critical Failure The new item immediately explodes, dealing [[/r {3d6}[piercing]]]{3d6 piercing damage} to Vendra.

Vendra deals and extra [[/r {2d6}[precision]]]{2d6 precision damage} to @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Flat-Footed]{Flat-Footed} creatures.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SneakAttack]
keys to apartments and Lavender
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.4tIVTg9wj56RrveA]
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.rQWaJhI5Bko5x14Z]
